nasb.text: As He said this, all His opponents were being humiliated; and the entire crowd was rejoicing over all the glorious things being done by Him.

esv.text: As he said these things, all his adversaries were put to shame, and all the people rejoiced at all the glorious things that were done by him.

cnv.text: 他說完了這些話，那些與他為敵的人都慚愧；群眾卻都因他所行一切榮耀的事歡喜。

ccb.text: 反对祂的人听了这番话后，都非常羞愧，众人却为耶稣的奇妙作为高兴欢喜。

csbs.text: 耶稣说了这些话，所有反对他的人都感到蒙羞，可是众人都因他所行的一切荣耀的事而感到欢喜。
